name: Repository Source, Path, and Context Impact Proof Gate
purpose: Produce direct Evidence that tracked-path facts and stable source bytes are exact, Module write ownership is total and exclusive, Context Capsules consume the same opaque ownership product, and Context Expansion Impact is derived only from neutral frozen structural inputs.

oracle.description: The fixed Assurance Runtime tracked-path observation proof must exist and exit zero.

rejects: a partial, failed, truncated, duplicated, malformed, or over-limit tracked-path observation treated as exact
tracked paths emitted without canonical repository-relative normalization or an exact digest

residualUncertainty: The proof characterizes the current-host Git adapter; cross-platform command and encoding boundaries remain an explicit Assurance Runtime Gap.

command: const source = await import('./src/core/repository-source.mjs'); if (source.REPOSITORY_SOURCE_PRODUCT_PROOF_VERSION !== 1) throw new Error('Repository Source Product proof version 1 is not implemented.'); await import('./test/assurance-runtime/tracked-path-observation.test.mjs');

oracle.description: The fixed tracked-only Repository Source Product stabilization, projection, byte-read, and attack scenario must exist under proof version 1 and exit zero.

rejects: A/B/C source observations or an unavailable Git binding treated as stable
missing or partial repository, Git, tracked-inventory, or exact path-set expectations
an untracked, missing, extra, duplicate, malformed, escaping, symlink, non-regular, unreadable, replaced, drifted, or over-limit source path
a forged, proxied, cloned, serialized, cross-repository, stale-binding, manifest-substituted, unknown-read, or mutation-aliasing product
a source projection, error, or coordination record that leaks an absolute repository root or source body

residualUncertainty: The proof establishes bounded stable facts for tracked files under the local single-writer support boundary; it does not claim a concurrent-adversary filesystem snapshot, raw read enforcement, authenticated controller identity, or acceptance authority.

oracle.description: The fixed Project Model ownership and Context Capsule attack scenario must exist and exit zero.

rejects: an unowned tracked path or a path matched by multiple Module owners
latent overlap between effective write or disposition selector domains without a currently tracked witness
an absolute, parent-relative, NUL-bearing, or unsupported selector
a forged, serialized, wrong-Model, stale-path-facts, or over-limit ownership product
Context Capsule write scope derived directly from Module declarations or an ungoverned disposition

residualUncertainty: Read context may intentionally overlap; this Gate proves exclusive write ownership and does not infer architectural coupling from imports or file contents.
The selector grammar is deliberately restricted to exact paths and literal recursive prefixes rather than general glob intersection.

oracle.description: The fixed Project Model neutral Context Expansion Impact compilation and attack scenario must exist and exit zero.

rejects: a Context Kernel Session object or caller classification substituted for neutral exact prior-path, request-path, ownership, Model, or source inputs
a forged, serialized, wrong-Model, stale-path-facts, stale-source, duplicate, malformed, already-disclosed, unowned, disposition-only, or over-limit impact input
a broadened owner, Module, Contract, assurance crossing, disposition, semantic-impact, verification, Evidence, or acceptance conclusion

residualUncertainty: The proof derives structural Context Impact from declared Model and ownership facts; it does not infer semantic code impact, verify source behavior, enforce reads, or decide acceptance.

oracle.description: The fixed Kernel scenario must prove one stable ownership product is reused for Context Capsule and touched-path enforcement and exit zero.

rejects: Kernel reinterpreting ownership selectors or dispositions instead of consuming the Project Model product
Context Capsule and touched-path checks consuming different Model or tracked-path observations
a frozen Candidate retaining write authority after ownership policy or path facts drift

residualUncertainty: Filesystem capability enforcement and worker execution remain later Outcomes; this Gate proves the compiled authorization input and Kernel adoption seam.
